Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reasonable Attorney'S Fees; Notice Of Motion To Modify Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-26-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF EMANUEL JOLISH'S Motion For Reasonable Attorney's Fees; Motion To Modify Judgment is denied for insufficient service. Served by mail on August 30, 2006; earliest hearing date could be September 27, 2006. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
